SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Joystick
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: App restart required when changing peripherals

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable Ping
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Prevents Bluetooth HID from sleeping by sending periodic empty reports

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Zero Latency Mode (Root)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Requires Magisk/Root. Disables Bluetooth power saving for lowest possible delay.

Preference.app:title: List Connected Devices
Preference.app:summary: Show all input devices connected to this phone
